summary: OBE — the '20th-century' label inaccuracy the curmudgeon flagged in SEC-8b.3.c3 is no longer present in the current SEC-8b.3 TLDR. Verified: full-file grep of data/sections.json for '20th' returns zero hits in any TLDR; the §8b.3 TLDR no longer characterises Kim & Chang's date span at all. Kim & Chang is referenced inside the details body with neutral 'Kim & Chang 2018 39-eclipse ensemble' phrasing. Fix was achieved by elimination rather than substitution. See OBE-2 in EXP-304.
